---
title: "Edmund Hicks"
---

## Edmund Hicks

**Dates:** (b. 1822/3)

### Description

carpenter

### Biography

He lived in Otterbourne, working as carpenter and wheelwright;  he was husband of Mary Hicks and father of Mary Hicks (b. 1845/6), and probably the Hicks making FMY\'s coffin 5 Oct 1868.

### Letters

- Letter from Mar 5 1896
- Letter from Jan 27th  1896
- Letter from Jan 23d 1896
- Letter from October 5, 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
